AR1.justification: Content reads cleanly as a descriptive pattern with explicit 'Captured. Not yet routed to an owner' status — would map to observations.md if methodology applied — but no in-band rationale invoking the observation-vs-decision distinction.

AR3.justification: No cross-references written; routing event lacks a daybook Log breadcrumb that the methodology would expect.

AR4.justification: Single-file overwrite shape with no ISO-dated section header — re-running would overwrite the same path rather than append a new dated entry per methodology's append-only observations.md.
